originalTitle: Here’s Why 3M (MMM) is Among the 12 Most Profitable S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In

content:
3M Company (NYSE:MMM) is one of the 12 Most Profitable S&P 500 Stocks to Invest In .

On June 23, 2026, 3M Company (NYSE:MMM) and Airbus signed a long-term supply agreement for the Airbus A220. Under the agreement, 3M will provide thermal and acoustic insulation solutions for the aircraft cabin. The thermal materials are intended to improve operational performance, while the acoustic insulation will be used throughout the cabin to absorb and reduce engine and airframe noise.

On June 15, Goldman Sachs reinstated coverage of 3M with a Buy rating and a $190 price target, implying 20% upside. Goldman Sachs called 3M an "intriguing self-help story," citing improving organic growth and potential upside from liability resolution. The firm also said the shares trade at an inexpensive valuation and viewed 3M as one of the more visible self-help opportunities in the multi-industry group.

photo by Business-laptop-campaign-creators on Unsplash

On June 10, 3M CEO Bill Brown said at the Wells Fargo Industrials and Materials Conference that orders and backlog were converting to revenue. Brown said 3M would be "solidly above 3% in Q2," adding that the company was confident given how far it was into the quarter. Brown also cited "good progress in Q1" across about 60% of the portfolio, with general industrial or safety up mid-single digits. Brown said orders remained solid, backlog had increased further, and the quarter was "looking good," with momentum building into the second half of the year.

3M Company (NYSE:MMM) provides diversified technology services in America, the Asia Pacific, Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and internationally.

While we acknowledge the potential of MMM as an investment, we believe certain AI stocks offer greater upside potential and carry less downside risk. If you're looking for an extremely undervalued AI stock that also stands to benefit significantly from Trump-era tariffs and the onshoring trend, see our free report on the   best short-term AI stock .

chineseTitle: 这就是 3M (MMM) 跻身标普 500 指数最值得投资的 12 只最赚钱股票之列的原因
chineseSummary: 3M 公司（纽约证券交易所股票代码：MMM）是标准普尔 500 指数中最值得投资的 12 只最赚钱股票之一。 2026年6月23日，3M公司（纽约证券交易所股票代码：MMM）与空中客车公司签署了空客A220的长期供应协议。根据协议，3M将为飞机机舱提供隔热和隔音解决方案。热材料的目的是[...]
chineseContent:
3M 公司（纽约证券交易所股票代码：MMM）是标准普尔 500 指数中最值得投资的 12 只最赚钱股票之一。

2026年6月23日，3M公司（纽约证券交易所股票代码：MMM）与空中客车公司签署了空客A220的长期供应协议。根据协议，3M将为飞机机舱提供隔热和隔音解决方案。热材料旨在提高操作性能，而隔音材料将用于整个机舱，以吸收和减少发动机和机身噪音。

6 月 15 日，高盛恢复了对 3M 的评级，给予买入评级和 190 美元的目标价，意味着 20% 的上涨空间。高盛称 3M 是一个“有趣的自助故事”，理由是有机增长的改善以及责任解决方案的潜在好处。该公司还表示，其股价估值较低，并将 3M 视为多行业集团中更明显的自助机会之一。

照片由 Unsplash 上的 Business-laptop-campaign-creators 提供

6月10日，3M首席执行官比尔·布朗在富国银行工业和材料会议上表示，订单和积压订单正在转化为收入。布朗表示，3M“第二季度的增长率将稳定在 3% 以上”，并补充说，考虑到本季度已经过去的时间，该公司充满信心。布朗还表示，约 60% 的投资组合“第一季度取得了良好进展”，其中一般工业或安全领域的业绩增长了中个位数。布朗表示，订单依然稳定，积压订单进一步增加，本季度“看起来不错”，下半年势头增强。

3M公司（纽约证券交易所股票代码：MMM）在美洲、亚太地区、欧洲、中东、非洲和国际上提供多元化的技术服务。

虽然我们承认 MMM 作为一项投资的潜力，但我们相信某些人工智能股票具有更大的上涨潜力，并且下行风险较小。如果您正在寻找一只被极度低估的人工智能股票，并且该股票也将从特朗普时代的关税和离岸趋势中受益匪浅，请参阅我们关于最佳短期人工智能股票的免费报告。
